positive: A highly detailed, stylized cosmic owl silhouette perched on a crystalline lunar branch. The owl must have prominent, geometric feather details and glowing sapphire eyes. Background elements include swirling nebulae, abstract constellations formed by glowing gold lines, and floating glyphs. Style is a blend of Art Nouveau, vaporwave aesthetics, and Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print quality. High contrast, strong centralized composition, deep jewel tones contrasted with glowing electric blue and metallic gold accents. Clean lines, crisp edges, perfect for apparel print.
